scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c green,blue "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.start: npm run build -w web && npm run start -w server
scripts.db:reset: rm -f data/pondo.db data/pondo.db-wal data/pondo.db-shm && echo 'database reset — restart the server to recreate'
scripts.backup: mkdir -p backups && cp data/pondo.db "backups/pondo-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).db" && ls backups | tail -5
